meaning: adj.已自由的,未装订的 vbl.unbind的过去式和过去分词
examples: May you glide gracefully through this world, unbound by secularity.
She unbound her hair and let it flow loose in the wind.
Something seemed to have been unbound and released in him, very quietly.
Unbound by time or dust or rot.
In the meantime, Superman: Unbound drops on DVD, Blu Ray, and various downloadable platforms tomorrow.
